# Polymath OS

> Polymath OS is one gamified learning system for people mastering several skills at once. Instead of scattering progress across Notion, habit apps, courses, and spreadsheets, everything lives on one screen: build a custom roadmap for any skill, learn in bite-sized lessons, prove it with quizzes, earn XP, and climb seven ranks from Novice to Polymath.

## What it is

- **Category:** Gamified, multi-skill learning app (educational software / self-education OS).
- **Core loop:** Learn → Quiz → Earn XP → Level up. It is a loop, not just a tracker.
- **The problem it solves:** Progress on different skills normally lives in five disconnected apps that never talk to each other. Polymath OS unifies them into a single XP system and rank, so someone growing in more than one direction at once has one honest picture of whether they actually improved.
- **Who it's for:** People who refuse to specialize — juggling things like coding, fitness, finance, languages, chess, writing, and public speaking at the same time.

## What it does (four pillars)

1. **Create** — Build your own curriculum. Add any skill (coding, languages, music, finance, anything), define milestones, set depth and pace.
2. **Learn** — Bite-sized micro-lessons, most finishable in under 5 minutes. No 4-hour videos or 600-page textbooks.
3. **Test** — Every lesson ends with a quiz; spaced repetition surfaces what you're forgetting. Reading something is not the same as knowing it.
4. **Level up** — Every correct answer earns XP. Every skill has levels. Your dashboard becomes a real map of what you actually know.

## Ranks

Seven ranks, earned by total XP across all skills (rank reflects the whole skyline, not your single tallest skill):
Novice (0 XP) → Seeker (100) → Initiate (400) → Adept (1,000) → Expert (2,400) → Master (5,000) → Polymath (10,000).

## Streak freeze

Break a streak and it resets — quitting is meant to cost something. But for days you genuinely can't show up, you can freeze a streak for a small one-time fee and keep your XP and rank intact. (Built and live.)

## Coming next

- Auto-XP from apps you already use (e.g. a GitHub commit → Coding XP; a logged workout → Fitness XP).
- AI Skill Auditor: adaptive questions that score you 0–100 on a skill and generate a real milestone plan.

## Key facts

- **Price:** Free. An optional Pro tier is planned later, but the core app never requires payment.
- **Full launch:** September 1, 2026.
- **Beta:** Live now at https://web.polymathos.xyz (rough in places; early users get founding-member perks).
- **Waitlist:** https://polymathos.xyz/ (waitlist members get early access and founding-member perks).
- **Maker:** Built solo by Shaz (Instagram @mdshaz_) under The Verge Studio. No investors, no team.

## How it compares

- Unlike Duolingo (languages only) or Coursera (courses only), Polymath OS sits on top of everything you're working on at once, feeding one shared rank across all skills.
